data.title: Crypto Is Here To Stay—Even The SEC Can’t Do Anything About It, Analyst Says
data.description:
The US markets have seen a surge of digital coins. Millions of Americans now hold tokens in their wallets. Blocking all of it suddenly would be nearly impossible. At the same time, leaving this sector with no rules puts everyday investors in harm’s way
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/crypto-is-here-to-stay-even-the-sec-cant-do-anything-about-it-analyst-says/

data.title: Ethereum Founder Warns of Potential Risks in Treasury Expansion
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin has commented on the expansion of Ethereum treasury companies, which has broadened access for a wider range of investors to acquire ETH. However, he cautioned that if not managed properly, this trend could develop into an "over-leveraged game."

data.title: Whale Trader Increases Long Positions Amid Market Activity
data.description:
According to PANews, on-chain analyst Yu Jin has reported that the whale trader known as @AguilaTrades has been actively increasing long positions through TWAP after initially opening them yesterday afternoon. The current value of these long positions has reached $223 million. Previously, this trader has experienced losses after increasing positions to $400 million five consecutive times.

Currently, the trader holds an unrealized profit of $4.76 million. The positions include a 40x leveraged long on 1,277 BTC, valued at $150 million, with an entry price of $115,968 and a liquidation price of $112,932. Additionally, there is a 25x leveraged long on 18,833 ETH, valued at $73.64 million, with an entry price of $3,774 and a liquidation price of $3,600.

data.title: Hong Kong's Ed Financial Group Partners with Zhongnong Rongxin for Agricultural Tokenization
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Hong Kong's Ed Financial Group has announced a strategic partnership with Zhongnong Rongxin, a rural digital asset service operator. The collaboration aims to advance agricultural tokenization projects and explore fundraising opportunities in Hong Kong, enhancing Zhongnong Rongxin's market position in agricultural fintech.

Zhongnong Rongxin will be responsible for selecting, integrating, and managing foundational assets related to agriculture and rural areas in China, coordinating cross-regional project resources, and providing high-quality assets. Ed Financial has been appointed as the exclusive advisor for capital market and technology-related matters. Their role includes designing tokenization structures for rural and agricultural product assets, executing real-world asset securitization, and facilitating overseas financing, mergers and acquisitions, and IPOs. Ed Financial will offer comprehensive sponsorship and underwriting support for these capital market transactions.

data.title: AI-Web3 Innovation Fund Opens for Applications
data.description: According to PANews, the pSTAKE Foundation has announced the launch of its $50 million AI-Web3 Innovation Fund, now open for applications. This initiative aims to accelerate research, development, and collaboration in the cutting-edge fields of generative artificial intelligence and decentralized networks. The fund focuses on five strategic areas: decentralized generative agents, which are fully on-chain autonomous AI entities; on-chain provenance, ensuring transparent attribution for datasets, models, and agent outputs; market layers for AI assets, including valuation, exchange, and collateral protocols; programmable creative engines for AI-driven dynamic multimedia; and secure, composable infrastructure for building interoperable AI-Web3 systems.

data.title: Oblong Pledges $8 Million in TAO Tokens and Explores Bittensor Partnerships
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Nasdaq-listed company Oblong (OBLG) has pledged $8 million in TAO tokens. The company plans to continue evaluating additional TAO token purchases on a weekly basis. Oblong is also exploring partnerships within the Bittensor ecosystem to potentially develop technological products, aiming to align its operational and financial strategies.

Earlier reports from Foresight News indicated that Oblong purchased 5,025 TAO tokens at an average price of $328.38 each in July, totaling approximately $1.65 million, and subsequently staked them. The company had previously raised $7.5 million to establish a strategic reserve of TAO tokens.

data.title: CME Data Indicates High Probability of September Rate Cut
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from CME's 'FedWatch' tool suggests a 92.7% probability of a 25 basis point rate cut in September, while the likelihood of maintaining the current interest rate stands at 7.3%.

data.title: SharpLink buys $85M in ETH expands treasury to $2.12B
data.description:
8-8-2025 – SharpLink Gaming, a Nasdaq-listed firm, has acquired 21,959 ETH valued at $85. 46 million, further expanding its Ethereum treasury to 543,898 ETH, worth approximately $2. 12 billion. The purchase, executed over the past four hours, was first reported by on-chain analytics platform Lookonchain
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/sharplink-buys-85m-in-eth-expands-treasury-to-2-12b/

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Pledges Additional Support for Tornado Cash Co-Founder
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Ethereum Foundation's Co-Executive Director, Hsiao-Wei Wang, announced via social media that the foundation will donate an additional $500,000 to support the legal defense of Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm. This contribution aims to assist Storm in his ongoing legal challenges.

data.title: The Bitcoin Order: US President Set To Sign Executive Order Protecting Bitcoin Access
data.description:
In a bold move that could reshape the crypto landscape, the US President is reportedly preparing to sign an executive order aimed at protecting access to BTC and digital assets. If enacted, this landmark policy would redefine the relationship between digital assets and the US financial system. Bitcoin Steps Into The Political Spotlight Bitcoin has officially entered the hall of power, as the US President Donald Trump is preparing to sign an executive order that would prohibit banks from refusing services to Bitcoin and crypto-related companies. This move signals a major shift in the US policy and ends years of financial censorship against the crypto industry
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/executive-order-protecting-bitcoin/

data.title: Ripple and SEC end legal battle over XRP with joint dismissal
data.description:
8-8-2025 – Ripple and the SEC filed a joint dismissal Wednesday, officially ending their appeals and concluding a five-year legal saga over XRP. The XRP price spiked over 4% following the development, with some sources reporting gains as high as 8%. The joint dismissal was signed by attorneys representing Ripple, CEO Brad Garlinghouse, Executive Chairman Chris [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ripple-and-sec-end-legal-battle-over-xrp-with-joint-dismissal/

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Prioritizes Quick Withdrawals Over Decentralization in Ethereum's L2 Strategy
data.description:
According to PANews, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has emphasized the importance of achieving quick withdrawals within one hour over reaching Stage 2 in Ethereum's Layer 2 (L2) solutions. This shift in priority highlights the challenges posed by the current one-week withdrawal waiting period, which negatively impacts user experience and increases cross-chain costs. For instance, liquidity providers in intent-based bridging solutions like ERC-7683 face a week-long capital lock-up, raising cross-chain fees and forcing users to opt for less secure multi-signature solutions, contrary to L2's original goals.

Buterin proposes a 2-of-3 hybrid proof system combining Zero-Knowledge (ZK), Optimistic Proof (OP), and Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) technologies. This system aims to provide immediacy and sufficient production verification, ensuring security with any two systems, thus avoiding the time cost of waiting for ZK technology to fully mature.

Buterin's recent statements suggest a pragmatic shift from his earlier idealistic focus on decentralization and censorship resistance. By prioritizing quick withdrawals and a 12-second finality, he is reshaping the priorities within the L2 space, paving the way for Ethereum's 'Rollup-Centric' strategy. This approach aims to establish Ethereum Layer 1 as a unified settlement layer and liquidity center, making it more challenging for other blockchains to compete with the Ethereum ecosystem.

The market's preference for user experience and efficiency over decentralization ideals has driven this shift from 'ideal-driven' to 'result-oriented' strategies, reflecting Ethereum's evolution towards a more commercial and competitive direction.

However, achieving the desired user experience and infrastructure goals will likely require advancements in ZK technology's maturity and cost control. Despite rapid progress, ZK technology's current costs remain a constraint, with 500k+ gas ZK proofs limiting submission frequency to hourly intervals. Achieving the ultimate 12-second goal will depend on breakthroughs in aggregation technology.

The logic is clear: frequent proof submissions by individual Rollups are costly, but if proofs from multiple Rollups can be aggregated into one, the cost per 12-second slot becomes economically viable. This presents a new technical route for L2 competition, where projects that excel in ZK proof optimization may find a foothold, while those focused solely on Optimism's optimistic proofs risk losing direction.

data.title: Paradigm and Partners Address Senate's Cryptocurrency Legislation
data.description: According to PANews, Dan Robinson, General Partner and Head of Research at Paradigm, announced on the X platform that his team, along with Multicoin Capital, Chainlink, Electric Capital, Galaxy, Ribbit Capital, and Tribe Capital, has submitted a letter to the Senate Banking Committee regarding the proposed cryptocurrency market structure legislation. The Senate's draft differs from the House-passed CLARITY Act, particularly on the regulation of token securities. Paradigm believes the Senate's 'ancillary asset' approach is more favorable for the crypto industry. Both legislative proposals are seen as improvements over the Howey Test system, which is considered difficult to apply and potentially counterproductive. The Senate's draft is noted for its simplicity, avoiding the imposition of rigid frameworks on decentralized tokens and protocols. It includes exclusion clauses to prevent misuse, specifying that assets with certain financial rights are not considered ancillary assets.

data.description:

source: https://www.benzinga.com/crypto/cryptocurrency/25/08/46987640/eric-trump-teases-american-bitcoin-stock-market-listing-next-stop-nasdaq?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site
